Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Migrate to Metalsmith 2.7.0 with native statik method

- Replace metalsmith-static-files plugin with native statik\(\)
- Move static assets \(images\) to src/assets/ for statik pass-through
- Keep bundler inputs \(main.css, main.js, styles/\) in lib/assets/
- Update watch paths for new asset structure
- Remove unused monokai.css
- Add migration-ms2.7.md documenting the migration process

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
